ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate indicator (e.g., Strong-Cold, Weak-Hot) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate indicator */,
  "thresholds" TEXT /* Temperature or precipitation thresholds for the indicator */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the climate indicator (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the indicator was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate data point */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate indicator */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year (e.g., Jan, Feb) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data point */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the climate indicator for the given month and year */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, weather station) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES climate_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES months ("month_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month (e.g., Jan, Feb) */,
  "days_in_month" INTEGER /* Number of days in the month */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season associated with the month (e.g., winter, spring, summer, fall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year (e.g., 2022) */,
  "is_leap_year" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the year is a leap year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the year record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the model was updated */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the model (e.g., percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecasting algorithm */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the algorithm was updated */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the algorithm (e.g., MAE, RMSE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellite_imagery" (
  "imagery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite imagery */,
  "imagery_date" TEXT /* Date the imagery was taken */,
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the satellite */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the imagery */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Geographic coverage of the imagery */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the imagery (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the imagery was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imagery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_imagery_satellite_id FOREIGN KEY ("satellite_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the station */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the station information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real-time data point */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate indicator */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year (e.g., Jan, Feb) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data point */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the climate indicator for the given month and year */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the real-time data was collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the real-time data (e.g., satellite, weather station) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the real-time data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the real-time data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES climate_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES months ("month_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., heatwave, storm) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was sent */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the alert is applicable */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_type FOREIGN KEY ("alert_type") REFERENCES climate_indicators ("indicator_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, meteorologist) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the user information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the access log was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the collaboration information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_lead FOREIGN KEY ("project_lead") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
